payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You also have until the 19th of this month at 9:00pm to subscribe to receive the next month's Loot Crate in time, otherwise the cutoff happens, and the next one looks pretty cool. So you guys should definitely try and get into that window if you can. Let me see. There is a-- oh! Our first "Dear Vox Machina" article went up last week, answered by our fantastic Scanlan Shorthalt over there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, mobilize.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Indeed. And I want to say, though it's only been a couple days past, happy birthday to Marisha. Happy birthday this past Tuesday to Marisha.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I know, it looks so pretty.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is pretty slick, actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Thank you. This is as fresh as I can get. Because I've been sleeping in the studio.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's pretty fresh. So fresh and so clean.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You look like a Wicked and Divine character. It's pretty great.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What color will you be next week?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You know, I think I'm going to stick with the lavender for a while. I think I'm slowly going to move it towards amethyst.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hey, I like it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Little green, little blue.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Also, as a note, Taliesin is the new host of Signal Boost. The next run on the show that Marisha is the creator and co-producer on, writer, all that other fun stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Along with Shaun Becker and Eric Campbell. Couldn't do it without those guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You had a fun promo go up this week as a teaser for it. That was rather fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Check it out. It's very good.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Time passes. What are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, be careful!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Doesn't even pay attention to you, runs up to the door and hits the door and it's solid. He goes and pulls on it and it seems to be closed, so he goes, "Mommy? Mommy?" He seems genuinely excited, but also trying to get in the front door.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I walk up behind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I whisper to Pike and be like, mm, we didn't think about this potential outcome, did we?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hello? Is anyone home? It's relatively safe--er. Than it was.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: A few moments pass. Silence.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, be careful!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Doesn't even pay attention to you, runs up to the door and hits the door and it's solid. He goes and pulls on it and it seems to be closed, so he goes, "Mommy? Mommy?" He seems genuinely excited, but also trying to get in the front door.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I walk up behind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I whisper to Pike and be like, mm, we didn't think about this potential outcome, did we?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hello? Is anyone home? It's relatively safe--er. Than it was.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Time passes. What are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Can I check the door, if it's locked?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The door itself doesn't have a knob per se, it has a small dark iron handle that's bolted to it, but you pull it and something's holding it back, like there's something actually barring it from the other side.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's a good thing.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Puts Theodore down. "Hold on, let me--" She goes and steps inside of her home. Eventually a few moments later she comes back and she has a small handful of coins.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of course. Well.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It takes you a few minutes, but you eventually climb your way up, looking down into the second floor. Part of the roof is fully pushed in, it looks like there's a piece of wayward stone that was ejected from an impact not too far from here, possibly from one of the nearby temples, that ended up slamming through the roof. It's partially embedded in the ground, the wood's splintered up around it, but it didn't hit the bottom floor, it lodged itself in the floor of the second.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, he needs this, he needs this, it's all right, absolutely needs this.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll explode the door!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: All that clanking is actually this key moving about my armor. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Unlocks the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That key has seen a lot of miles.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Been around the world.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You push and the door hits something.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Damn it. Doors.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It like budges maybe a quarter-inch.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's barricaded the door, that's a good thing, that's a really good thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I go to the crack. Pop-Pop Wilhand! It's Pike!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I go and look through the window, is there a window?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There is a window, there is cloth shuttered around it, you cannot see in the inside.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And the hole in the roof. Could I get up it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You could probably get up there if you wanted. Go ahead and make a-- make an athletics check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Bugger all, I say we give it a shove.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Looking across the way, you see the fireplace mantle has been ruined where the original small shrine to Sarenrae used to be, looks like it's been knocked over and then put back together on top haphazardly, like it was shattered and then was put up there and is delicately keeping its form by how it was laid. The rest of the room is cold. It's quiet other than your footfalls.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: He's very strong.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're going to give a push to the front door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: More amusing when you consider that there's a glass window right next to it that is not blocked at all, shuttered so carefully.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There's a window, there's nothing in front of it, you want to come in the window?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We give a shove.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We give a big shove.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a strength check, with advantage we'll say as you-- well, him, having advantage you're helping.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, him having advantage because I'm helping.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh. 18. Is my strength.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18. You guys have to slam it a few times, and the impact lodges a few things loose. Come cascading down, causing a bit of a racket, but eventually you manage to get it pushed open enough where you guys can squeeze through.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You just broke a chaise lounge, but come in.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Pike, after you.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I step in and start looking around.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Pike? Oh my goodness." And his hand reaches out and grabs yours and you pull him up and he's covered in dust and dirt and he's probably been down there-- the smell, probably been down there for a few days.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: There are hiding places.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys go through the kitchen area, and as you are looking about, moving stuff, in the pantry area there is a small wooden slat that is partially moved across that leaves a small opening in the floorboards.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Percy! Wilhand?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Hello?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Shh! I'm not here!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Pike, I've got good news, he says he's not here!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I go running down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you run and you push stuff out of the way. There's the one board that's slid open, all the rest of the boards are still loose and placed over it. Do you just take the boards and toss 'em up?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I just pull them off.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you pull the boards off, what little bit of light has made its way from the window on the far end of the kitchen, you can see a bit of glimmer off a set of glasses that immediately recoil in the shadow and go, "Oh!"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Pop-Pop Wilhand!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "So. It's been a while! All of you!"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I missed you so much, I'm so glad you're okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Look at you, look at you. Where'd you get this scar? Oh."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Long story, we'll get there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I want to hear this story-- and it's Grog!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hello Wilhand!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Runs up, goes to give you a hug and goes, "Oh! Come down, come down."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, no-- yes. Take it easy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You big guy." And his eyes go from really warm to suddenly very cold, and he goes, "They came back for me. They came back for me. I saw 'em in the street."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I know, it's all right. It's all right, Wilhand. It's all been taken care of.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "They didn't find me though, they didn't find me."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You hid.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I did, and they didn't find me at all. There was no way they could find me. I know where the secret places are."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I see where Pike gets her smarts from.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You get the sense he meant at dawn, to make an aggressive action.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Pike. He has a mansion."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: He does. He does have a mansion. It's a magic mansion.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is Wilhand drunk right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He looks like he's coping with the past week's events.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Insight check his soberness.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's been drunk the whole time.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Should we make the mansion, get Wilhand a room, and then go to our last destination of this night before we turn in?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we could do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah Grog, how long do you reckon we have before your cousin wants to either talk or get busy?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are we supposed to meet up with him later tonight?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He said, at dawn, we-- Wait, at dawn we fight, or at dawn we plan?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't think I've ever heard anyone say "at dawn, we plan." So I'm going to assume--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: At dawn, we plan!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: At dawn, we rise and make a plan!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: At dawn, we quorum!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: At dawn, we Microsoft Excel!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You guys took a short rest the end of the last session.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I need you to roll a hell of a persuasion check on this one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Roll for initiative, Sam.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Roll for initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Holy shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, it's a 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shut up!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But that's low for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He goes  "I'll think about it. I'd like to see more of your fine abode."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I call for five servants, and I instruct them to take him wherever he'd like to go and give him whatever he needs.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (Wilhand voice) "Wine cellar!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They begin taking him on a tour of the grand estate.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't be cheap with the chicken! All right, so I scoot out back to rejoin our friends.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I assume at some point we're taking a short rest, by the way.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So, your wisdom modifier is actually a five, because she forgot to add her level 12 bonus we discovered recently. So it's now a 20, plus five on the roll. So go ahead and roll a d20, add five.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Who can undo magical thingies?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Not me, Pikey! Pike? Pike, you got any undo magicky things?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This would be a Dispel Magic spell, for the record.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I have Dispel Magic.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have it prepared?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Then yeah, you could give it a shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're my girl!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I could try my Dispel Magic ability.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What's that one?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's called a bullet. I'll shoot it until it doesn't work anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. So. Pike. So as you step forward, they point out this glyph on the wall. You're going to cast Dispel Magic on it, I need you to go ahead and roll a d20 and add your spellcasting ability modifier, which--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Whoa! Oh, what is it, what was it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a 20 on the floor!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If it was bad it doesn't count, but if it's good it does.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That doesn't count. Roll it intentionally.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Good, because it's not that good.

payload.trigger_phrase: You come to the conclusion that there is nothing
payload.raw_text: Okay. You come to the conclusion that there is nothing else to find in this room.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Percy is a paranoid rich person, so he knows things about them.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: Trust paranoid rich people to know.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Make a general investigation check throughout the room as you search for any nooks and crannies, hidden spaces.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: I rolled a one.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Well, investigation again? 20.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I mean, if you sit for like up to half an hour or an hour rest, then yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right. Nothing catches your attention specifically. You get to the kitchen, the kitchen is cold, layer of dust. Doesn't appear to be anything of particular interest in there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Hm. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Downstairs it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You know what, appreciate your rogues is all I'm saying, am I right or am I right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So. You guys who wish to head down into the basement--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going downstairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grog, you're still staying outside?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, actually, can Trinket and I walk to the other side of the street?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Trinket's in my locket.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I walk to the other side of the street?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But do you want Trinket with you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you walk to the other side of the street on your own.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, and I watch the house from across the street.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Stakeout.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, since this is taking a bit, it's not a short rest is it, if I'm chilling?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's now in the middle of the air.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait wait wait.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What if it explodes the lock and then we're not able to get in at all?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Then waah, we go kill a dragon instead.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well. Sort of, yeah yeah yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Then at dawn, we talk about things.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: At dawn, we discuss!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We plan!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: At dawn!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I already had my great moment, all right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So what're you doing, Scanlan?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can Unseen Servant carry a key, or is it more Mage Hand-y?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I mean, a key's not-- Mage Hand can even do five pounds on its own.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll do Unseen Servant, named Mort.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Mort.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's a slight shift of wind. And while you guys see nothing after the wind fades, you know Mort is with you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm holding the key up to Mort. I don't know where he is.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's right in front of you! Don't be rude to Mort!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nothing happens.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Mort. Take the key.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The key lifts out of your hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's very unsettling.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: A series of notes scribbled on the paper. You can see a number of sketches of the construct of the actual golem itself, pieces of its body and its form, but some of it's been torn and crumpled up, tossed aside, failed attempts.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's true, the Hunk of Quall. I pull out the Hunk of Quall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Pull it out, hold it aloft, it begins to glow a little bit and react. The golem's chest glows a little bit and reacts. In a far distant corner, underneath the alchemical table, in a pile of some pieces of wood and crumpled stone, there's a slight dull glow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I walk over and I start brushing it away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you pull it away. You find an almost full loop of metal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Would it be a dark iron cobalt band?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it is, actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Thank god for that lump of Quall.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oi, did she pick it up already?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Didn't kill us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, that's good. Did it wake up the beast?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, the circlet's glow has faded. You have it in your hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well. We have the thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to quickly take a look at the papers that were buried in--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's funny because it's relevant. All right. So, you feel there is a connection trying to be made, but you would need time to attune to this, should you want to take the time to do so. 30 minutes to an hour, depending.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Failed attempts? Does he write his name anywhere?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Damn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I take off my very prized circlet that I love oh so much.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Why'd you make that face?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, nothing. What're you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And I put the serpent circlet on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And I concentrate to see what it feels like.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And I hand my circlet to-- Don't break it!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Of course I'm not going to break it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's a family heirloom.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll have Mort hold it. Mort!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So the circlet floats in the air, just out of reach. Concentrate, as soon as you place it on your head, it locks to the sides of your head and you feel this cold probing into your mind for a moment.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's installing Windows.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Not Windows 10, not Windows 10, god damn it! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm so sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Into the corner. Face the corner for a minute.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Grog, much time goes by. 20, 30 minutes. Not a peep. Silence.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's a family heirloom.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll have Mort hold it. Mort!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So the circlet floats in the air, just out of reach. Concentrate, as soon as you place it on your head, it locks to the sides of your head and you feel this cold probing into your mind for a moment.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's installing Windows.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Not Windows 10, not Windows 10, god damn it! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm so sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Into the corner. Face the corner for a minute.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's funny because it's relevant. All right. So, you feel there is a connection trying to be made, but you would need time to attune to this, should you want to take the time to do so. 30 minutes to an hour, depending.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's take all of this out of the house, maybe.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Including the golem?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I want to stay here and see. You guys continue looking around. I'm going to meditate for a second.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So, now as the sun is disappearing right behind the mountains and nighttime is coming, you lead Vax southward through Westruun, dodging around a few patrolling goliath Herd members, and eventually find your way to the alley where the entrance to the sewer, the protruding entrance existed where you left Dr. Dranzel and Kaylie and a number of survivors that were in the ruined Temple of Arathis.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What what what?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can you do that mend-y thing still? This is her, Pom-pom? Pop-Pop, I dunno. Glue the head back on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Pop-Pop's? Okay okay okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, glue the head back on. And then I chase after Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I do the mending on the Sarenrae statue.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And in doing so, you reaffirm the single-piece form that was the small shrine setup for the Sarenrae shrine in the home.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And I want to try a few tricks with the golem, but throwing that out there. Go ahead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We'll get to that in a moment. Where are you going?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to where I dropped her off at the sewers. And I'm hoping that he can track or something?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Probably should've brought a ranger with you, I'm really good at tracking.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Fuck! I don't know what you people can do! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Outstanding!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: About a minute passes, and then you come back to your normal pace.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and roll for that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do I roll a d20 for it?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's talking to a whale right now somewhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Eight points.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (slow-mo) hate-- you-- (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Tell us all about the nature of politics.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just think, the fun thing is, I think you're aging much slower than the rest of us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. This is, this, hmm.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) This is the most torturous thing ever.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you go ahead and reach out and touch it, and the healing magic seeps up into the crack that Grog left behind, and the crack fuses shut.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's cool, that's cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For how much was the total?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Eight points.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, fuses shut entirely, it's like there was no crack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So he gets healed by a heal--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's getting six feet off the ground vertically. And then landing with a heavy impact each time, causing these divots to continuously push into the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. This is, this, hmm.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) This is the most torturous thing ever.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you go ahead and reach out and touch it, and the healing magic seeps up into the crack that Grog left behind, and the crack fuses shut.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's cool, that's cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For how much was the total?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Eight points.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, fuses shut entirely, it's like there was no crack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So he gets healed by a heal--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: About a minute passes, and then you come back to your normal pace.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, it's-- no, it's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How was that, how did that feel? Was it frustrating?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Good, good. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can it--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Thank you, that's all I need.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can it fly?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ooh. Fassbender, can you-- I don't think he can fly.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Just try it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fassbender, can you fly?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Tell it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fly, Fassbender, fly.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: How high did it jump?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How high is it jumping?

payload.raw_text: As this time has passed, you guys do return to the mansion, yeah.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: I want to be a monstah! (laughter)

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: All right!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: All righty. So your strength is back up to 19 with the Gauntlets of Ogre Power. Beefy Pike is back.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: I also have-- wait, is Scanlan back? (sniffs) Do I smell poo?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As this time has passed, you guys do return to the mansion, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: No! At the dummy. I'm going to try it. I'm going to try swinging the axe at the dummy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It sticks into it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Good swing! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're not as strong as him per se, you're--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Vicious, vicious. Oh wait--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your strength is 13, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What's that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your strength is 13, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: My strength?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Strength is 13, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's not, because you haven't put the gauntlets on.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I didn't, I don't think I erased that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well hold on, I had to take the Gauntlets of Ogre Power off, do you want them back? Now, I think you have to give 'em up for the boots, but it's your pick, it's a kite-- or you can be a monstah!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I want to be a monstah! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: All right!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. So your strength is back up to 19 with the Gauntlets of Ogre Power. Beefy Pike is back.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I also have-- wait, is Scanlan back? (sniffs) Do I smell poo?

payload.raw_text: Grog sprung awake, gathered the folks in the pre-dawn hour of the following morning. You gather your stuff, exit the mansion, and start making your way towards the Margrave's house.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: I give him a hug and a kiss on his cheek.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: I kick the dirt a little bit and then I walk away and I click my heels. Little jump-and-click.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: And-- anything else, before the evening's rest comes? All right. Sleep finds you all, some easier than others, until a measured period of time, I believe?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Grog sprung awake, gathered the folks in the pre-dawn hour of the following morning. You gather your stuff, exit the mansion, and start making your way towards the Margrave's house.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: --oh, I know, but all right. Anyway. Thank you for this-- sort of. I guess I have to go to my room and think about this while I stare at my picture in the mirror above my bed.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Which is-- what's your picture?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's just a mirror. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But, listen. I do love you, I will always love you, even in death, and thank you for telling me that and-- I hope it doesn't come to that, but if it does, that makes me feel a little bit better about things.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Well, I love you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sleep tight.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I give him a hug and a kiss on his cheek.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I kick the dirt a little bit and then I walk away and I click my heels. Little jump-and-click.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And-- anything else, before the evening's rest comes? All right. Sleep finds you all, some easier than others, until a measured period of time, I believe?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

payload.raw_text: You guys exit Wilhand's place and there is a cross-street that Wilhand's home is nearby, that's like a building sandwiching it on each side, and the one just south of it is on the corner of that cross street. Across the way as you guys exit the room, or exit the front of the building, you see two figures stand up, arms crossed. The same individuals you saw earlier.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Grog sprung awake, gathered the folks in the pre-dawn hour of the following morning. You gather your stuff, exit the mansion, and start making your way towards the Margrave's house.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Is there anyone on the street?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: 19. Plus zero.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. You approach, you recognize them. They're the same two people that were watching you while you guys were resting directly after the battle with Kevdak in the center of the square, the two that were assigned to keep an eye on you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grog sprung awake, gathered the folks in the pre-dawn hour of the following morning. You gather your stuff, exit the mansion, and start making your way towards the Margrave's house.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is there anyone on the street?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: 19. Plus zero.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys exit Wilhand's place and there is a cross-street that Wilhand's home is nearby, that's like a building sandwiching it on each side, and the one just south of it is on the corner of that cross street. Across the way as you guys exit the room, or exit the front of the building, you see two figures stand up, arms crossed. The same individuals you saw earlier.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Of Wilhand's place?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Same people I saw outside of the house earlier. All right, fuck this shit. I turn and I walk towards those two people.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. You guys all enter into the foyer area. The throne is across the way, there's a long hallway that leads to the back of the estate, and at the very back you can see the throne. There are some low sconces in the walls that give the flicker of light, in the center there is a round table which is currently set. There are some weapons and daggers, a few javelins tossed onto it, looks like some fruit that's partially eaten, and there on the table you see Zanror, already armored up, arms splayed across the side, looking down at the table, looking down at the weapons before him. Behind him, you see his wife, the lady, the other pregnant goliath that is currently behind rubbing his shoulders and talking to him into his ear. They both look up and see as you approach, at which point Zanror whispers to her for a second.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I make eye contact with both of them. I seek an audience with Zanror.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "He's expecting you, get in."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We go in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you guys walk into the house, you see the interior of the Margrave's abode. Across the way there is a haphazard throne that's been built from lumber and carts and things that were pulled from resources within the town. You can see this is probably where Kevdak sat once they had taken the home, the estate.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I grab my earpiece and very lightly say, Vax, keep your eyes about you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Are you all entering with Grog?

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Should we leave a couple outside or anything or no?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nope, stay together.

payload.raw_text: Tress puts her hand to the side. Ivon looks at her. "We'll take our chances with the wild." Turns around and exits the room.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Zanror-- Zanror, it's not worth losing any of your men before we fight this dragon, just let them go. You're already losing 18.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: "Open the door." The door slowly opens behind them. "All right, Ivon, you want to leave? Go. Take your people. But you better go now. Because when we're done cutting that dragon down we're going to come after you. Deserters. Or you can come to this fight with us. Yes, these dragon-slayers, he who fell from the sky and cut the uncuttable down-- we will gloriously bathe in the blood of that beast, take back the spoils that we fed it. You can do what you please. I have no interest in lording over you." Looks about the rest of you. "I've got your arms at my back for this. Aye?"

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Aye.
